message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="lea-verou" color="green" summary="Acknowledged review, ready for next tasks">
Thanks for the formal review and sign-off, Heydon. Appreciated.

Noted your stand-aside on gray-500. If we see any issues during usability testing, I'll bump to gray-600 immediately -- it's a one-token change.

Ready to support Task 8/9 with any accessibility-related CSS needs as they come up.
</teammate-message>

content.text: Acknowledged. Standing by for Task #8 (Complete a todo item) to begin. The checkbox pattern and focus management requirements are already documented from my earlier discussions with Steve Schoger and Steve Krug.
